profile.name: Niño Guian I. Nanit
profile.title: System Administrator
profile.summary: IT Professional with expertise in Linux Server Management, Network Security, and Cloud Deployment.

tasks.task: Monitor and maintain bank servers and network infrastructure to ensure 99.9% uptime.
Manage user accounts, permissions, and access controls in Active Directory.
Handle first-level IT support and troubleshooting for staff hardware and software issues.
Perform regular backups and security scans to protect sensitive financial data.
Configure and monitor firewalls, VPNs, and security protocols.
Document system configurations and IT procedures for compliance.
Encodes receipts and verifies the accuracy of numerical data.
Ensures completeness and consistency of entries in digital records.
Organizes, sorts, and maintains receipt documentation.
Drafting of proposal / quotation for project requirements.
Drafting for hiring employment on social media.
Assisted in preparing and organizing planning documents, reports, and correspondence.
Supported data collection and encoding for socio-economic profiles.
Participated in community consultations, surveys, and field validation activities.
Gained exposure to local governance processes and public administration.

project.title: Company Server Migration
project.desc: Led the migration of 20 physical servers to virtual machines with zero downtime.

project.title: Network Security Hardening
project.desc: Implemented a new firewall policy and VPN access for remote employees.

project.title: Automated Backup System
project.desc: Built a automated nightly backup script using Bash and rsync to AWS S3.
